exercises.name: Chords
exercises.userMessage: Hear the chord and choose your answer

children.name: Basic seventh chords
children.description: Practice recognizing common seventh chord qualities in root position.

children.name: Dominant seventh - inversions
children.description: Practice recognizing dominant seventh chords in different inversions.

children.name: Major seventh - inversions
children.description: Practice recognizing major seventh chords in different inversions.

children.name: Minor seventh - inversions
children.description: Practice recognizing minor seventh chords in different inversions.

children.name: Inversions of basic seventh chords
children.description: Practice recognizing basic seventh chords across inversions.

children.name: Seventh chords with an altered five
children.description: Practice recognizing seventh chords with flattened or sharpened fifths.

children.name: Seventh chords with a minor seven
children.description: Practice recognizing seventh chords built with a minor seventh by ear.

children.name: Seventh chords with a major seven
children.description: Practice recognizing seventh chords built with a major seventh by ear.

children.name: All seventh chords
children.description: Practice recognizing a full set of seventh chord qualities by ear.
